## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run pytest` / `npm test`) and lint is clean (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Specs in `.tr/` updated to reflect any behavior change
- [ ] Generated types regenerated (`npm run generate`) if backend models changed
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
